query: Let's write acceptance tests for this story before we build it — I want red-phase failing tests that assert the ACs so we can do TDD.
I want to do ATDD on the coupon-redemption story: generate the failing acceptance test scaffolds first, then we implement to make them pass.
Scaffold the red-phase acceptance tests for these acceptance criteria so the developer has failing tests to drive the implementation.
The feature is already implemented but we have coverage gaps — expand the automated test suite to cover the untested paths.
Build a traceability matrix from our acceptance criteria to existing tests and give me a quality-gate decision.
Design the epic-level test strategy with a risk assessment and coverage priorities before any tests are written.
